programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: An unlikely group of former '80s video game champions step up to save the world from an alien invasion in this visually spectacular action-adventure.

programme.title: Major League: Back To The Minors
programme.desc: A pitcher is about to be put out to pasture when he is given the opportunity to manage a team.

programme.title: Bad Teacher (2011)
programme.desc: A foul-mouthed seventh grade teacher who is dumped by her sugar daddy starts to pursue a colleague, which provokes conflict with the school's model teacher.

programme.title: Bewitched (2005)
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Nicole Kidman and wickedly funny Will Ferrell star as actors playing Darrin and Samantha on a remake of the television show "Bewitched" in this cleverly crafty comedy from director NoraEphron.

programme.title: Excess Baggage
programme.desc: Alicia Silverstone (Clueless) stars in this romantic comedy about a woman who tries to get back at her father by faking her own kidnapping. When her harebrained scheme gets her locked in the trunk of her own car, she falls into a relationship with a car thief (Benicio Del Toro).

programme.title: The Three Stooges (B&W Shorts)
programme.sub-title: Oily To Bed, Oily To Rise
programme.desc: The Stooges are tramps looking for handouts. Although the boys are down and out, Curly seems to get everything he wishes for. After some trouble with a farmer, the boys come across an abandoned car, one of Curly's wishes. The car actually belongs to some con men who have just gypped the widow Jenkins out of her land. The boys wind up at the Mrs. Jenkins house just in time for a free meal. To repay Mrs. Jenkins the boys try to fix her well and instead unleash an oil geyser. Learning that Mrs. Jenkins has been swindled, the boys go to retrieve the deed before it can be recorded. They find the bad guys and after a wild fight recover the deed. The boys return the deed to Mrs. Jenkins and marry her daughters; April, May and June.

programme.title: One Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A series of mishaps threaten a recently divorced mom's attempts to make her two kids' first Christmas "without dad" perfect.

programme.title: Little Women (1994)
programme.desc: Winona Ryder lights up the screen in this classic story of love and family devotion.

programme.title: On Strike For Christmas
programme.desc: Sick of being taken for granted by her husband Stephen (David Sutcliffe) and her sons, Joy Robertson (Daphne Zuniga) organizes a holiday protest which quickly earns the supportof most of the women in town.

programme.title: This Christmas
programme.desc: This year, Christmas with the Whitfield's promises to be one they will never forget. All the siblings have come home for the first time in years and they've brought plenty of baggage with them. As the Christmas tree is trimmed and the lights are hung, secrets are revealed and family bonds are tested. As their lives converge, they join together and help each other discover the true meaning of family.

programme.title: It's Christmas, Eve
programme.desc: Eve Morgan is in a tough spot when she is assigned to shut down a school's failing music program.

programme.title: Just in Time For Christmas
programme.desc: A young psychology professor must choose between moving across the country for her dream job or staying in her hometown to marry the man of her dreams. On a foggy December night, she gets little help from a Coachman, who brings her three years into the future and shows her what her life will become.

programme.title: Call Me Claus
programme.desc: When Lucy Cullins (Goldberg), hires an actor named Nick to play Santa Claus for a TV network, she gets more than she bargained for. Nick really is Santa Claus, and he faces mandatory retirement after 200 years on the job. Nick must find his replacement by Christmas Eve or the world will face dire consequences.

programme.title: Mixed Nuts (1994)
programme.desc: Philip runs a crisis hotline with Catherine and Mrs Munchnik. That's the easy part, now it gets tricky... Stanley loves evicting people and he evicts Philip. Philip loves helping people and he is loved by Catherine. Catherine is loved by Louie who loves writing songs. Chris loves dancing to songs and loves to wear large dresses. Gracie also loves to wear large dresses because she's pregnant. She loves the baby's father, Felix, who loves to paint. That just leaves Mrs. Munchnik who hasn't been loved by anybody in a very long time.

programme.title: The Night Before
programme.desc: A group of childhood pals get together in New York on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Dick (1999)
programme.desc: Two clueless teenagers unwittingly get involved in the Watergate scandal that brought down the Nixon administration.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin becomes a Da Vinci with a kiss and a twitch from Samantha.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha uses insults to please a poet while Darrin uses an amulet to curb Endora's insults.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Love at first sight presents more problems than romance for Darrin and Samantha.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: To Go Or Not To Go, That Is The Question
programme.desc: The High Priestess of Witchdom dethrones Darrin in his own "castle."

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: The Empress Hepzibah's decision that witches and mortals don't mix is delayed.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin discovers that bedwarmers can be worse than mothers-in-law, es-pecially when they're "hot."

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin can't be held for theft when the evidence turns out to be an old flame of Serena's.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: A flirtation of Serena's turns Darrin to stone.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Esmeralda's wacky witchcraft causes Paul Revere to ride again.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha runs into an old flame whose affection for her gives Darrin something to "crow" about.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha and Darrin find out that 17th Century Salem is no place for a witch without witchcraft.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin falls into the generation gap when he instantly becomes an old man after an unfriendly "zap" from Endora.

programme.desc: Endora's spell forces Samantha to play "Simon Says" with cousin Serena.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: Roger is to have an operation. After telling Jeannie he always wanted to be a surgeon, Tony finds himself masked and gowned in the operating room.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: Tony insists that Jeannie stop waiting on him. Jeannie takes the sacred oath of the genies to refuse any further request for help he might make.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: Tony and Roger decide to go to Reno. Roger's vision of becoming a multimillionaire with Jeannie's help disappears when Tony tells him Jeannie is not going with them.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: Tony, accompanied by Jeannie, goes to the golf course to deliver some documents to General Peterson.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: Jeannie is disappointed that Tony has never asked for anything big, like a yacht.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.sub-title: Bigger Than A Bread Box And Better Than A Genie
programme.desc: Madam Zolta, a fortuneteller, impresses Roger with her knowledge of his past.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: The astronauts paint pictures to be auctioned off at the Air Force Benefit Show.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: Nostalgia grips Jeannie when she learns the local museum is showing an exhibit from Bukistan, her old home.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: Tony is assigned to assure Princess Tarji a good time during her three-day visit to the country, since the US is anxious to make a deal for oil with her father, the Shah of Pakuait.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: Jeannie brings dinner to Tony's office. Overhearing Tony and Jeannie late at night, Dr. Bellows tells General Peterson Tony is having an orgy.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.sub-title: I'll Never Forget What's Her Name
programme.desc: Tony receives a letter asking him to escort Miss Gordon around Cocoa Beach.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Jeannie wants to celebrate the first anniversary of meeting Tony on the desert island where they met. Preparing for a space flight, Tony forgets the date. Annoyed, Jeannie makes his capsule land on the island where Tony finds a bottle.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Tony tells Jeannie it's too bad every day can't be Sunday. Feeling Tony is overworked, Jeannie blinks and it becomes Sunday. She tells a horrified Tony it will be Sunday until he is rested.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: While Tony is at the Base, Harry Huggins comes to his nose. He tells Jeannie the house is tiny and the furniture shoddy. To impress him, Jeannie blinks and turns the house into a luxurious mansion, with world famous art works, a safe full of money and a staff of servants.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Tony tells Jeannie he enjoys cold weather. She starts a snowstorm and the flakes fall on Dr. Bellows. Determined to discover the explanation for the strange happenings around Tony, Dr. Bellows tells Gen. Peterson

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Tony strains his eyes while studying for a sub-orbital flight. Dr. Bellows orders him to take an eye test the following morning. Tony emphatically turns down Roger's suggestion that he get Jeannie's help in passing the examination.

programme.title: Eight Millimeter
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage is a private detective hired to investigate the source of a crudely shot eight millimeter film. The investigation sends him down a gritty and frightening path into society's darkest corners.

programme.title: Get Carter
programme.desc: A Las Vegas mob enforcer travels back to his hometown to investigate his brother's mysterious death.

programme.title: Underworld: Blood Wars
programme.desc: The fifth installment of the Underworld franchise.

programme.title: Dragon Wars
programme.desc: Meet Buraki, the vicious, 200-meter long Imoogi serpent from ancient Korea. His army includes giant lizards with missile launchers, flying dragons, soldiers bred for evil and mega-intelligent dinosaurs. Together, they will destroy Los Angeles and possibly the world unless reincarnated warriors Ethan and Sarah can outrun them and resurrect the Good Imoogi, Buraki's ancient nemesis.

programme.title: Flatliners (2017)
programme.desc: Med students stop their hearts to experience the afterlife.

programme.title: Armored
programme.desc: A young armored car guard is persuaded by his veteran cohorts to empty the truck of its $10 Million.

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A platoon of Marines battles an alien invasion on the streets of Los Angeles.

Never before has a date in history been so significant to so many cultures, so many religions, scientists, and governments. 2012 is an epic adventure about a global cataclysm that brings an end to the world and tells of the heroic struggle of the survivors.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: Human cloning technology has fallen into destructive, corrupt hands but one man refuses to be a pawn in the deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Total Recall (2012)
programme.desc: As the nation states Euromerica and New Shanghai vie for supremacy, factory worker Doug Quaid begins to suspect that he's a spy, though he is unaware which side of the fight he's on.

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: Rambo (2008)

programme.title: Insidious: The Last Key
programme.desc: Parapsychologist Dr. Elise Rainier faces her most fearsome and personal haunting yet - in her own family home.

programme.title: The 5th Wave
programme.desc: When the human race is on the verge of extinction, one of the last survivors on earth, an extraordinary young woman, goes on a mission to track down her younger brother who was abducted by the extra-terrestial creatures colonizing earth.

programme.title: Anaconda 3: Offspring
programme.desc: A ruthless mercenary, Hammett (David Hasselhoff) and his team are on the hunt for a pair of giant snakes that have escaped and are on a mega-sized feeding frenzy.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome To Raccoon City
programme.desc: Witness the beginning of Evil Raccoon City, which was once a booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, is now a dying Midwestern town. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Gothika
programme.desc: A criminal psychologist (Berry) awakens to find herself a patient in the institution where she works, with no memory of the murder she's accused of committing. As she tries to regain her memory - and her freedom - a vengeful spirit manipulates her.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: In 2154, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy, and the rest, who live on a ruined Earth.

programme.desc: Renowned art thief and former daredevil Crunch Calhoun (Kurt Russell) teams up with a motley crew of international grifters to pull off the most elaborate double-crossing caper of a lifetime.

programme.title: Enough
programme.desc: Working-class waitress Slim (Jennifer Lopez -The Wedding Planner) thought she was entering a life of domestic bliss when she married Mitch (Billy Campbell - TV's "Once and Again"), the man of her dreams. After the arrival of their first child, her picture perfect life is shattered when she discovers Mitch's hidden possessive dark side, a controlling and abusive alter ego that can turn trust, loveand tranquility into terror.

programme.title: Secret Window
programme.desc: Superstar Johnny Depp gives one of the most captivating performances of his career in this grippingpsychological thriller.

programme.title: Tears of the Sun
programme.desc: After a West African president's family is assassinated and civil unrest is rampant, a top secret team is deployed to the far reaches of the jungle to rescue a U.S. doctor who is acting as a missionary. She insists the U.S. forces rescue all of her charges. As a result, the group falls under rebel attacks when it is revealed that the son of the deposed West African president is among those being saved.

programme.title: Ivanhoe (1982)
programme.desc: Sir Walter Scott's epic novel of timeless romance and knightly daring comes to life! The year is 1194. At long last, the noble knight Wilfred of Ivanhoe (Anthony Andrews) has returned from the Crusades to regain his title and win the hand of his beloved Lady Rowena (Lysette Anthony).

programme.title: The Mask of Zorro
programme.desc: A sweeping tale of love and honor, tragedy and triumph set against the Spanish conquest of Mexico, THE MASK OF ZORRO stars Anthony Hopkins and Antonio Banderas. After twenty years as the legendary Zorro, Don Diego (Hopkins) must transform a troubled drifter (Banderas) into the fearless hero he oncewas.

programme.title: The Legend Of Zorro (2005)
programme.desc: A threat to California's pending statehood causes Alejandro de la Vega to take action.

programme.title: Inferno (2016)
programme.desc: Robert Langdon follows clues to stop a virus that would wipe out half the world's population.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Josh Johnson: Symphony
programme.desc: Debuting original material about the shared experiences as humans, tackling topics like family, religion and relationships through his unique point of view and signature creativity; expecting an original and unforgettable experience, filmed at the Wiltern Theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Goodbye Christopher Robin
programme.desc: After leaving London for the English countryside, writer A.A. Milne starts to spin fanciful yarns about his son's growing collection of stuffed animals. These stories form the basis for Winnie-the-Pooh and The House at Pooh Corner, published respectively in 1926 and 1928. Milne and his family soon become swept up in the instant success of the books, while the enchanting tales bring hope and comfort to the rest of postwar England.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: Larry crashes a party in Boston Harbor; Joe McCarthy airs his grievances on the senate floor.

programme.title: The Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ashley "Ash" Williams (Bruce Campbell), his girlfriend and three pals hike into the woods to a cabin for a fun night away. There they find an old book, the Necronomicon, whose text reawakens the dead when it's read aloud. The friends inadvertently release a flood of evil and must fight for their lives or become one of the evil dead. Ash watches his friends become possessed, and must make a difficult decision before daybreak to save his own life in this, the first of Sam Raimi's trilogy.

programme.title: Evil Dead II
programme.desc: The second of three films in the Evil Dead series is part horror, part comedy, with Ash Williams (Bruce Campbell) once again battling horrifying demons at a secluded cabin in the woods. After discovering an audiotape left by a college professor that contains voices reading from the Book of the Dead, Ash's girlfriend Linda (Denise Bixler) becomes possessed by evil spirits that are awakened by the voices on the tape. Ash soon discovers there is no escaping the woods.

programme.title: Evil Dead
programme.desc: Mia (Jane Levy), a drug addict, is determined to kick the habit. To that end, she asks her brother, David (Shiloh Fernandez), his girlfriend, Natalie (Elizabeth Blackmore) and their friends Olivia (Jessica Lucas) and Eric (Lou Taylor Pucci) to accompany her to their family's remote forest cabin to help her through withdrawal. Eric finds a mysterious Book of the Dead at the cabin and reads aloud from it, awakening an ancient demon. All hell breaks loose when the malevolent entity possesses Mia.

programme.title: Evil Dead Rise
programme.desc: A reunion between two estranged sisters gets cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

programme.title: Open Water
programme.desc: Daniel (Daniel Travis) and Susan (Blanchard Ryan) embark on a tropical vacation with their scuba-diving certifications in tow. During a group dive, the two separate themselves from the others to dive a little deeper. An incorrect head-count suggests the entire group has returned, so the boat departs. When the pair surfaces, they make out a vessel in the distance, but it does not immediately set in that they have been left behind. With sharks lurking beneath, their survival chances grow smaller.

programme.title: The Man Will Burn
programme.desc: Burning Man grows from an anti-establishment group in San Francisco, founded by Larry Harvey in the 1980s, to a multi-million-dollar event with thousands of attendees and the backing of billionaire tech donors; first-time Burners look forward to the experience, while repeat attendees and organizers prep for the unpredictable as COVID-19 threatens the event.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: Larry crashes a party in Boston Harbor; Joe McCarthy airs his grievances on the senate floor.

programme.title: Deadpool 2
programme.desc: Wisecracking mercenary Deadpool meets Russell, an angry teenage mutant who lives at an orphanage. When Russell becomes the target of Cable -- a genetically enhanced soldier from the future -- Deadpool realizes that he'll need some help saving the boy from such a superior enemy. He soon joins forces with Bedlam, Shatterstar, Domino and other powerful mutants to protect young Russell from Cable and his advanced weaponry.

programme.title: How to Make a Killing
programme.desc: Disowned by his obscenely wealthy family, Becket Redfellow will stop at nothing to reclaim his inheritance, no matter how many relatives stand in his way.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: The Perfect Match
programme.desc: Charlie (Terrence J) is a charming playboy who doesn't believe in serious relationships. His best friends bet him that if he commits to one woman for one month, he's bound to fall in love. Charlie accepts the seemingly easy challenge, but wasn't expecting to cross paths with the beautiful and mysterious Eva (Cassie Ventura). When Charlie coaxes her into a casual affair, Eva turns the tables on him, forcing the lifelong bachelor to question whether he wants more than just a one-night stand.

programme.title: Ready Player One
programme.desc: In 2045, the creator of a virtual reality universe promises his fortune to the first person to discover a digital Easter egg. Soon, young Wade Watts finds himself in a reality-bending treasure hunt through the mysterious and fantastical world.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: On the brink of losing her childhood home, a desperate woman agrees to date a wealthy couple's introverted and awkward 19-year-old son. However, he proves to be more of a challenge than she expected, and time is running out before she loses it all.

programme.title: Ocean's Eight
programme.desc: Debbie Ocean assembles an all-female team of thieves and specialists for a heist during the Met Gala, aiming for the $150 million worth of diamonds around the neck of world-famous actress Daphne Kluger.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: The Man Will Burn
programme.desc: Burning Man grows from an anti-establishment group in San Francisco, founded by Larry Harvey in the 1980s, to a multi-million-dollar event with thousands of attendees and the backing of billionaire tech donors; first-time Burners look forward to the experience, while repeat attendees and organizers prep for the unpredictable as COVID-19 threatens the event.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: Larry crashes a party in Boston Harbor; Joe McCarthy airs his grievances on the senate floor.

programme.title: The Bride!
programme.desc: A scientist revives a murdered woman as a companion for a legendary creature. The aftermath defies all expectations.

programme.title: They Will Kill You
programme.desc: A woman answers a cryptic ad for a housekeeping job at a luxurious yet foreboding New York City high-rise. Upon arrival, she discovers residents have vanished without a trace for decades, fueling whispers of a satanic cult lurking in the shadows.

programme.title: How to Make a Killing
programme.desc: Disowned by his obscenely wealthy family, Becket Redfellow will stop at nothing to reclaim his inheritance, no matter how many relatives stand in his way.

programme.title: Greenland 2: Migration
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

programme.title: The Long Walk
programme.desc: Teens participate in a grueling high-stakes contest where they must continuously walk or be shot by a member of their military escort.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: Pillion
programme.desc: A timid man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic, impossibly handsome biker takes him on as his submissive.

programme.title: Bang My Box: The Robin Byrd Story
programme.desc: Explore the rise of a boundary-pushing, sex-positive, cable-access pioneer who became an accidental AIDS-era lifeline and First Amendment fighter; at 70, with 600 shows behind her, she considers her place in the history she created.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: Larry crashes a party in Boston Harbor; Joe McCarthy airs his grievances on the senate floor.

programme.title: Miss You, Love You
programme.desc: A blunt, grieving widow is forced to plan her husband's funeral with a total stranger: her estranged son's assistant.

programme.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
programme.desc: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian and Pacific Islander, also known as the AANHPI, communities in America.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: Dumb Money
programme.desc: Everyday people flip the script on Wall Street and get rich by turning GameStop into one of the world's hottest companies. In the middle of everything is Keith Gill, a regular guy who starts it all by sinking his life savings into the stock. When his social media posts start blowing up, so does his life and the lives of everyone following him. As a stock tip becomes a movement, everyone gets wealthy -- until the billionaires fight back and both sides find their worlds turned upside down.

programme.title: Earth, Wind & Fire (To Be Celestial vs. That's the Weight of the World)
programme.desc: Directed by Ahmir Questlove Thompson, exploring the musical origins and lasting cultural impact of Earth, Wind and Fire.

programme.title: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: Elle Woods (Reese Witherspoon) has it all. She wants nothing more than to be Mrs. Warner Huntington III. But there is one thing stopping him (Matthew Davis) from proposing: She is too blond. Elle rallies all of her resources and gets into Harvard, determined to win him back.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: Larry crashes a party in Boston Harbor; Joe McCarthy airs his grievances on the senate floor.

programme.title: The Moment
programme.desc: As her arena tour debut looms, a pop star finds herself caught inside the afterglow of a breakout summer under the mounting pressure of what it costs to stay on top.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: Lurker
programme.desc: A retail employee infiltrates the inner circle of an artist on the verge of stardom. As he gets closer to the budding music star, access and proximity become a matter of life and death.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: Greenland 2: Migration
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

programme.title: The Bride!
programme.desc: A scientist revives a murdered woman as a companion for a legendary creature. The aftermath defies all expectations.

programme.title: The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Two lighthouse keepers try to maintain their sanity while living on a remote and mysterious New England island in the 1890s.

programme.title: Life of Pi
programme.desc: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Animal pals Alex (Ben Stiller), Marty (Chris Rock), Melman (David Schwimmer) and Gloria (Jada Pinkett Smith) are still trying to make it back to New York's Central Park Zoo. They are forced to take a detour to Europe to find the penguins and chimps who broke the bank at a Monte Carlo casino. When French animal-control officer Capitaine Chantel DuBois (Frances McDormand) picks up their scent, Alex and company are forced to hide out in a traveling circus.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

programme.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
programme.desc: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian and Pacific Islander, also known as the AANHPI, communities in America.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

programme.title: Alien: Covenant
programme.desc: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

programme.title: The Batman
programme.desc: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Robert McCall (Denzel Washington), a man of mysterious origin who believes he has put the past behind him, dedicates himself to creating a quiet new life. However, when he meets Teri (Chloë Grace Moretz), a teenager who has been manhandled by violent Russian mobsters, he simply cannot walk away. With his set of formidable skills, McCall comes out of self-imposed retirement and emerges as an avenging angel, ready to take down anyone who brutalizes the helpless.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: Robert McCall's mysterious past cuts especially close to home when thugs kill Susan Plummer, his best friend and former colleague. Now out for revenge, McCall must take on a crew of highly trained assassins who'll stop at nothing to destroy him.

programme.title: The Equalizer 3
programme.desc: Since giving up his life as a government assassin, Robert McCall finds solace in serving justice on behalf of the oppressed. Now living in Southern Italy, he soon discovers his new friends are under the control of local crime bosses. As events turn deadly, McCall becomes their protector by taking on the mafia.

programme.title: The Substance
programme.desc: Fading actress Elisabeth Sparkle becomes distressed when her chauvinistic boss fires her from her aerobics show. She soon injects herself with a mysterious serum that promises a younger, better version of herself, but things go horribly wrong.

programme.title: The Pope's Exorcist
programme.desc: Father Gabriele Amorth, chief exorcist of the Vatican, uncovers a centuries-old conspiracy while investigating a young boy's terrifying possession.

programme.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
programme.desc: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: Torn apart from her sister and her children, Celie faces many hardships in life, including an abusive husband. With support from a sultry singer named Shug Avery, as well as her stand-her-ground stepdaughter, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

programme.title: Smoking Tigers
programme.desc: Lonely 16-year-old Korean American Hayoung tries to hide her problematic family and lower-income background from her new wealthy friends.

programme.title: Paycheck to Paycheck: The Life & Times of Katrina Gilbert
programme.desc: A single mother from Tennessee struggles to support her family on a near-minimum-wage salary.

programme.title: Nixon by Nixon: In His Own Words
programme.desc: Richard Nixon secretly records his private conversations in the White House from 1971 to 1973.

programme.title: Surveilled
programme.desc: Tracking The New Yorker journalist Ronan Farrow as he investigates the growing business of commercial spyware, following the story from New York City to Tel Aviv, Israel, a thriving center of espionage cybertechnology. Once a target of covert surveillance himself, Farrow explores the multibillion-dollar industry, addressing the twofold uses and implications of phone hacking, the ability to monitor criminal activity and the attendant threats to civil liberties.

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: Once home to the most advanced civilization on Earth, the city of Atlantis is now an underwater kingdom ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a vast army at his disposal, Orm plans to conquer the remaining oceanic people -- and then the surface world. Standing in his way is Arthur, Orm's half-human, half-Atlantean brother and true heir to the throne. With help from royal counselor Vulko, Arthur must retrieve the legendary Trident of Atlan and embrace his destiny as protector of the deep sea.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: After failing to defeat Aquaman the first time, Black Manta wields the power of the mythic Black Trident to unleash an ancient and malevolent force. Hoping to end his reign of terror, Aquaman forges an unlikely alliance with his brother, Orm, the former king of Atlantis. Setting aside their differences, they join forces to protect their kingdom and save the world from irreversible destruction.

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: The true story of a team of unlikely underdogs -- a working-class gamer, a former race car driver, and an idealistic motorsport executive -- who risk it all to take on the most elite sport in the world.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: Weapons
programme.desc: When all but one child from the same classroom mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

programme.title: Hereditary
programme.desc: When the matriarch of the Graham family passes away, her daughter and grandchildren begin to unravel cryptic and increasingly terrifying secrets about their ancestry, trying to outrun the sinister fate they have inherited.

programme.title: Babygirl
programme.desc: A high-powered CEO puts her career and family on the line when she begins a torrid affair with her much younger intern.

programme.title: The Spectacular Now
programme.desc: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

programme.title: Life of Pi
programme.desc: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

programme.title: Quad Gods
programme.desc: Following the lives of three New Yorkers with quadriplegia who meet in a neuro rehabilitation lab where they create the world's first ever, fully quadriplegic e-sports team. As they navigate New York City, confronting challenges at every turn, they pursue their shared dream to compete as athletes while subverting assumptions about disability.

programme.title: Fists of Freedom: The Story of the '68 Summer Games
programme.desc: Black-power salutes by John Carlos and Tommie Smith delimit the Olympics during 1968's worldwide radicalism.

programme.title: United Skates
programme.desc: Credited with incubating East Coast hip-hop and West Coast rap, America's roller rinks have long been bastions of regional African-American culture, music and dance. As rinks shutter across the country, a few activists mount a last stand.

programme.title: Babe Ruth
programme.desc: Rare footage, home movies and interviews profile the legendary New York Yankee slugger.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: Previously thought to be extinct, a massive creature attacks a deep-sea submersible, leaving it disabled and trapping the crew at the bottom of the Pacific. With time running out, a visionary oceanographer recruits rescue diver Jonas Taylor to save the crew and the sea itself from an unimaginable threat -- a 75-foot-long prehistoric shark known as the Megalodon.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

programme.title: Daydream Nation
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Caroline finds herself entangled in a love triangle between her classmate and her teacher.

programme.title: Miller's Girl
programme.desc: A precocious young writer becomes involved with her high school creative writing teacher.

programme.title: Lady Macbeth
programme.desc: Power and murder collide in this critically-acclaimed thriller about the awakening of a young woman's desire.

programme.title: In Secret
programme.desc: In 19th century Paris, a bored young woman embarks on an affair with her husband's handsome friend.

programme.title: Professor Marston and the Wonder Women
programme.desc: A psychologist's polyamorous relationship with his wife and mistress inspires his creation of Wonder Woman.

Elsewhere, Afia meets fellow student Jasim, who is clearly something of a personality doppelganger - that is, to everyone except Afia herself. programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy about family life. After losing a swimming competition, Stewie tries to eliminate his rival by blowing up a lifeguard tower. His plan backfires and he has a near-death experience that seems to change him.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy series about family life. When Meg lands an internship with Mayor West, Brian argues that he is corrupt. Determined to expose West's shady ways, Brian and Stewie go undercover and discover that Meg is in deeper than they thought. Meanwhile, a local talent show brings Peter and Lois back to their folk singing days. Unfortunately, they also revert to their hippie ways and Chris must stage an intervention.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about Stan Smith, a hapless CIA man who is constantly on the alert for terrorist activity. When Steve is selected to sing the national anthem to a group of veterans, Stan decides that he must first experience the horrors of war.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about family man Stan Smith, who works for the CIA. When the CIA's budget is cut, Roger suggests a telethon might help restore funds, but Stan claims the idea as his own. Unfortunately, this only inspires Roger to sabotage the whole project.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. A severe storm is approaching when Mr Fischoeder hires Bob as his private chef for an event on a secret island for eccentric, wealthy and influential gentlemen, but the weekend event soon turns into a drug-fuelled and murderous rave with Bob acting as the only sober voice of reason - meanwhile, Linda gives the kids a crash course on cocktail party etiquette when the Belchers arrange a mocktail party for Tina.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Detective drama series. An archaeological dig uncovers a 30-year-old skeleton that seems to unsettle a local landowning family.

programme.title: Wycliffe

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly country doctor and his patients in Cornwall. When Martin and Louisa do not seem to be having much success with their therapy, Dr Timoney advises that they should try to take things back to the beginning of their relationship and plan a date - meanwhile, Louisa's ex-boyfriend Danny arrives from London with seven children to camp on Ruth's farm, things are going slightly better for Mrs Tishell and Clive, and Penhale is keen to lay down the law when Bert's whisky still is discovered.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When a student dies during a clinical trial for a controversial new anti-depressant drug, is her death murder or suicide? Lewis and Hathaway investigate and, as the body count rises, uncover a web of lies, jealousy and madness that Lewis himself could fall victim to.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: When Miss Marple accompanies Lady Virginia Revel to a weekend party at country estate Chimneys, she finds herself in the middle of an important diplomatic gathering which includes a number of Virginia's suitors. The strange array of guests clash over dinner, and that night Count Ludwig of Austria is found dead. When Miss Marple and Chief Inspector Finch discover a coded message and the remains of a murdered servant, Marple realises that the secret of Chimneys is even darker than she imagined.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Scott investigate a death in Midsomer Mere, a place where villagers seem to have the ability to predict future events - John Ransom's head was covered in scorch marks, the result of his brother Max's research into second sight. Is his death due to a pub brawl with his brother-in-law Ben Kirby over plans for a baptism, or is he a casualty of the bizarre experiments? In the battle between faith and science, even Barnaby thinks he has seen a man somewhere before... it's time to delve into the village's history for clues.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a solicitor falls from a roof to his death, Barnaby and Scott investigate whether it was suicide or murder. They discover that a rival lawyer was spreading harmful rumours about the dead man, but when this man is drugged and killed as well, the motive looks like revenge - but for what?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The Devil's Work: When the heir to the Stourwick Estate announces that his tenure will be the Shirewell family's last, someone sets about ensuring his plans never come to fruition. [S,AD] S24 Ep1

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The picturesque village of Mods Mire, famed for its annual charity pub quiz, is brimming with question setters and solvers - even the name is a puzzle to riddle out. It is home to the world-famous author Bertram Jewel, who created the bestseller Seeker, a book which sparked a nationwide treasure hunt by promising a hidden prize worth a life-changing amount to the person who could solve the clues within the drawings in its pages. Now, ten years later, with no-one any closer to finding the treasure, Bertram is relaunching the bestseller and has an announcement - as fans flock to Mods Mire for the relaunch, will this year finally be the year the treasure is unearthed? Only one can be bright enough to solve the cryptic clues, but when locals begin being murdered, Barnaby and Winter must see through the puzzles and sleight of hand to discover that, as always, murder is brutal but solvable when you have got all the pieces of the puzzle. Could this really be merely the work of a crazed fan?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope unearths a 30-year-old mystery when the son of a prominent local family is found brutally murdered on the sands of a seaside resort. When a second death takes place, Vera is faced with mounting pressure to crack the case.

programme.title: Wycliffe

When an intervention from DS Helen Morgan backfires, the unit are left at a loss.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fiz gets a distressing call from her mum in South Africa and Gail worries how David will react to her relationship with Joe.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Detective drama series. When two rich and outwardly successful brothers fall under suspicion of murder, Frost's quest for the truth leads to him being suspended from duty while a new lady friend enters his life.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Feelings run high when a community of travellers passes through Aidensfield, but worse is to come when a bank robber goes on the run. Greengrass can't resist the chance to make some easy money on a pony and trap race, but can he escape the long arm of the law?

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. A series of break-ins lead the police to suspect the culprit is a pupil from Pendlebury School for Boys, but they soon find that there is more afoot than a burglary spree. The Aidensfield Arms plays host to a guest who claims to have a glittering showbiz career behind him.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Careful not to be seen, Samantha Berry slips away from Whitcombe Grange - while dressed in Georgian period attire - on her way to a secret rendezvous. Unaware that a drone is filming her, she is then stabbed to death by an unseen assailant... With Kam away on a course, Barnaby and Winter meet locum pathologist Petra Antonescu and she informs them that the victim was stabbed with a feather quill pen - however, Barnaby is puzzled to find a syringe lying nearby. Tracing Samantha to the Grange, Barnaby and Winter meet owners James and Kitty Oswood - who explain that they host Jane Austen experience weekends - and Winter learns from the Oswoods' rebellious daughter Polly that Samantha kept asking questions about the house and village. When Samantha is found to be a journalist with a special interest in the local village's new delivery service for prescriptions by drone, Barnaby and Winter need to look back in time if they are to find her killer.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: As the King empire crumbles, will Matthew and Anna manage to make it down the aisle? Lee suspects Andy of sabotage, while Victoria gets the blame for Aaron's mischief making.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken worries Peter will gamble away Simon's inheritance. Amber is taken aback to find Tara emerging from Dev's bedroom, and a journalist comes to the factory looking for Rosie.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Prem agrees to let Dev's relationship with Tara continue, while Leanne accepts an invitation to tea with Peter - but draws the line at playing mum and putting Simon to bed.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. A mysterious suitcase disappears from a car wreck and unexplained parcels of cash are being received in the village - can Bernie help the police uncover the identity of Aidensfield's Robin Hood?

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. The Aidensfield locals have their own Scrooge to contend with in the form of a local bank manager, but the bank manager's son finds himself a target for rage when his father's mercenary ways threaten to ruin a local farmer - meanwhile, Greengrass takes the law into his own hands and sends David to pose as a debt collector.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A tour of Plummer's famous relish factory ends in tragedy when one of the visitors is crushed against towers of relish bottles and dumped naked into a 200-degree steriliser - when the dead man is found to be an executive with rival company Fieldway Foods, Barnaby and Scott's investigation uncovers many secrets and lies among the Plummer family. Someone is also trying to frighten matriarch Amelia Plummer, but who feels strongly enough about Plummer's Relish to commit murder?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Crime drama series. A blood-stained hotel room and a stolen credit card lead Ronnie and Joe to Charles Hutton, a wealthy member of the upper classes who dotes on his wife Camille and daughter Georgia. It is hard to work out what crime has been committed, but Ronnie and Joe have enough evidence to suggest that Georgia gave birth in the hotel room. There is no trace of a baby and it proves difficult for Jake and Kate to mount a prosecution case against Georgia and her boyfriend. To make matters worse, the defence counsel turns out to be an old opponent of Jake's, Maitland Cosby. As the evidence against the young couple stacks up, how far is Georgia's father prepared to go to protect her?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Crime drama series. When a spate of shootings claims one of Ronnie and Joe's own colleagues, the pair are left with little time to grieve - they must catch the killer before he or she moves on to the next person on the hit list. The next likely victim seems to be Henry Sharpe, head of the Crown Prosecution Service, but gradually the link between all the targets becomes clear. The connection is Mark Glendon, who has been in prison after being convicted of the murder of his wife four years previously. Although Glendon is still in custody, his case has been reopened for a retrial. The police face an uphill struggle to find any leads implicating Glendon in the shootings. With the new trial already underway, the race is on to catch the killer before the jury deliver their verdict.

programme.title: Trial & Retribution
programme.desc: The conclusion of this case of the crime drama. In a tense final act, Warrington and Wilding are tried together in a cut-throat trial as Warrington's defence barrister Halliday is pitted against prosecution counsel Willis Fletcher once more, but as North takes the stand as a key witness, this time the two men are joined by wily barrister Norma O'Sullivan. Only one man is guilty of murder, so can the jury unravel the complex web of lies and see justice done, can North cope with Warrington's persistent fixation with her, and can her relationship with Walker flourish under relentless pressure?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. The annual Thassingham Classical Music Festival draws in big audiences as several musicians anxiously compete for the coveted Falconer Bursary Award - shockwaves rocket though it when Jacob Wheeler is awarded the prize instead of the supremely talented Zac Sowande, but shock soon turns to horror when Jacob is found murdered strangled by violin string. Barnaby's initial investigations begin by focusing on Jacob's fellow musicians and their charismatic maestro Michael Falconer, who is using the festival to debut his Ninth Symphony while simultaneously belittling his own musician son Dan - when Barnaby realises that Jacob's Stradivarius is missing and that Jacob might not have been the completely dedicated musician his sister Natalie claims him to be, his subsequent investigations lead them deep into a world that is haunted by a potentially deadly curse.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Still reeling from the shocking death of one of their team, Ronnie and Joe have a new case to deal with when an innocent young mother is stabbed to death in a busy London market place. Under pressure from all sides to solve the case and make Londoners feel safe again, Ronnie and Joe struggle to gather enough evidence to charge the youth they believe is responsible - Bobbi Washington. When Bobbi inadvertently confesses to Ronnie, they think they have got him bang to rights - but with Bobbi's confession uncorroborated by anyone else, both Ronnie's honesty and his future as a detective are in doubt.

Cadfael had promised he would be back to marry her after leaving for the crusades, but never returned to honour his pledge.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Classic mystery drama with the world's most famous detective. A respectable city worker fails to return home one evening but was spotted in an opium den earlier that day. His wife calls in Sherlock Holmes to investigate his disappearance.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Classic mystery drama with the world's most famous detective. When several busts of Napoleon are smashed for no apparent reason and one incident is connected with a murder, Inspector Lestrade asks Holmes for help in solving the mystery.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Last year, as Alaskan temperatures rose, flowing ice from the Yukon River nearly wiped out an entire village. Now, the DOT are racing to stop an overflow that could take out the Dalton and its truckers with it. As drivers race to rack up loads in the Dash for the Cash, they're forced to team up for safety.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers - Deadliest Roads
programme.desc: When the mountain begins to crumble underfoot, Lisa Kelly is in grave danger with an oversized nine-ton load in tow. The unstable road gives way and claims its first victims. Fearing the worst about Lisa, Rick Yemm gets news from home that forces him to make a decision that will determine his fate in the Himalayas.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Action-adventure series based on best-selling novels by Bernard Cornwell. With its last battle having been fought, the Peninsula War is finally over for Britain and her allies, but the action does not end here for Sharpe as he is framed by his long-time enemy Ducos and accused of stealing Napoleon's treasures. Sharpe also finds himself abandoned by his wife Jane, who returns to England and meets the handsome Lord Rossendale - now on the run from both the English and the French, Sharpe must find a way to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Action-adventure series based on best-selling novels by Bernard Cornwell. programme.desc: Another adventure with the New York police officer and the English policewoman. Three young boys break into a warehouse but are disturbed by the owners - one of the intruders is called Ziggy, is one of Makepeace's informants, and manages to escape. They are all champions now, but there can be only one winner - to win the trophy, one team will need to survive three gruelling fights against the best opposition in the sport.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Higgins helps an old friend produce an opera while Thomas is hired to find a woman's missing brother - however, the PI soon discovers that the musical production is an undercover story for confidential negotiations between China and Britain.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Patrick Macnee - perhaps still best known as John Steed, the original TV Avenger - guest stars in this episode of the classic US action drama series. Higgins meets an old friend who imagines himself to be Sherlock Holmes, and they attempt to solve a murder together while evading a man who appears to be a stalker.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace
programme.desc: High level corruption is revealed - and there is a kidnapping drama. Dempsey relives a way of stealing cars and Makepeace pretends to resort to the oldest profession in the world.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Brian Clough makes a guest appearance in this episode of the classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken takes a job minding a tough Glaswegian footballer who finds it difficult to keep his eye on the ball, and Harry has a contract to guard some puppies and is asked to organise a local pub's football team.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Fantasy espionage series. Craig Stirling is caught up in an endless nightmare - is he dreaming, or is it real?

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Drama series about the shady dealings of a loveable rogue and his reluctant sidekick. Terry is hired out by Arthur to act as a minder for a newsagent who is being threatened.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme fishing series. In the second part of a two-part exploration in search of the world's greatest myth - the Loch Ness monster - Jeremy Wade leaves the loch to embark on a mission to the Arctic Circle on the trail of Nordic legend. While in Norway, Jeremy endures one of his most extreme fishing expeditions to catch a creature that could be a contender for a real animal behind the myth of the Loch Ness monster.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: The disappearance of three men in Russia provides a baffling case for Jeremy Wade.

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Motorbike magazine show. Henry Cole discovers that bikers and scooter riders can get on as he joins the Scooter Boys, the Bonneville restoration is down to a paint job as it gets a stunning new look, Pete the restorer reveals a talent for track racing, and Henry gets a glimpse of the custom bikes of the future in London's East End.

programme.title: Terminator II: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The indestructible Arnie's back in this Oscar-winning sequel starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, 1991. A virtually indestructible cyborg is sent to 1990s LA to kill a future human resistance leader.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Terminator II: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The indestructible Arnie's back in this Oscar-winning sequel starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, 1991. A virtually indestructible cyborg is sent to 1990s LA to kill a future human resistance leader.

programme.title: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds
programme.desc: Sci-fi prequel series. A comedy of manners ensues when Spock has a personal visit in the middle of crucial negotiations that he and Pike are conducting with an unusual alien species.

programme.title: Motorsport UK
programme.desc: Richard John Neill presents MSUK from Snetterton with racing from the MINI Challenge Trophy and the Porsche Carrera Cup.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. With the World Championship tournament just around the corner, the race for the BattleBots VII Giant Nut approaches the final straight with a fight card featuring some of the biggest names in the sport jockeying for tournament seedings in their final fight of the qualifying rounds - Lock-Jaw squares off against Madcatter in a match-up between jaws and claws, and two of the fastest machines in the show's history do battle when HyperShock tries to save its season against Claw Viper in the Main Event.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S]

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the planet's biggest and best motorsport series. These include the World Rally Championship (WRC), Formula One, World Motocross, NASCAR, British Touring Cars and much more.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Higgins helps an old friend produce an opera while Thomas is hired to find a woman's missing brother - however, the PI soon discovers that the musical production is an undercover story for confidential negotiations between China and Britain.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Patrick Macnee - perhaps still best known as John Steed, the original TV Avenger - guest stars in this episode of the classic US action drama series. Higgins meets an old friend who imagines himself to be Sherlock Holmes, and they attempt to solve a murder together while evading a man who appears to be a stalker.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace

programme.title: Boon
